description: Bug #1 regression (reported externally: a runOn/context entry that omits the optional `platforms` field once crashed context resolution with `Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'forEach')`). These permutations exercise the omitted-`platforms` resolution path end-to-end through the real runner: an entry with no `platforms` must expand and run on the host platform, not crash. All steps are non-driver (shell echo) so every permutation PASSes deterministically on Windows, macOS, and Linux. The unit-level guard lives in test/context-resolution.test.js ("resolveContexts with platform-less runOn entries").

tests.description: A bare runOn entry with no `platforms` (and no other gate) expands to the host platform and runs.
A runOn entry that omits `platforms` but carries a `requires` gate (met) — the exact shape whose omitted `platforms` once crashed resolution.
A mixed runOn array: one entry names platforms, another omits them. Both must resolve without crashing; the platform-less entry runs on the host.
